adjoint.preconditioner: boundary scale plus shared separable plasma preconditioner

validation.method: central difference of two fully reconverged equilibria

assessment: The supported axisymmetric exterior equilibrium has a matrix-free implicit external-field adjoint on the retained spectral-side, linear-panel formulation. End-cut radii and the physical pressure profile are held fixed. The nonaxisymmetric free-boundary derivative lane is deferred with M7.
